info.title: API Reference
info.description:
## Introduction

Welcome to the Qwilr Public API documentation. With our API you'll be
able to generate Qwilr Pages programmatically. This means you can
generate custom quotes, create pages when someone fills out a form,
or anything else.

Our API is organized around [REST](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Representational_State_Transfer).
All calls made are to your live account.

If you're looking for help with the Qwilr app you can find that in our
[help documentation](https://help.qwilr.com/).

If you have any questions about our API, please get in touch at
[help@qwilr.com](mailto:help@qwilr.com).

tags.name: Pages
tags.description:
Page objects correspond to pages in the Qwilr UI, allowing for the
creation of a public-facing Qwilr Page. The Qwilr API allows you to
create, delete and replace your Pages by sending through JSON objects.

tags.name: Blocks
tags.description:
Block objects correspond to blocks in the Qwilr UI. Pages and templates are
composed of a series of blocks. The Qwilr API allows you to get the list of
saved blocks from your account.

tags.name: Subscriptions
tags.description: Webhooks allow you to subscribe and unsubscribe from events on your Qwilr account.

tags.name: Account
tags.description: Miscellaneous operations concerning your Qwilr account.

tags.name: Taxes
tags.description:
Tax objects correspond to the quote tax definitions configured on your
Qwilr account. The Qwilr API allows you to create, retrieve, update and
delete these, so you can manage them and reference their IDs when building
quotes.

post.description: Creates a page from saved blocks or template.

name.description: Title of the page, visible as the browser page title.

published.description: Whether the page is publically available; `false` means the page will be in [Draft status](https://help.qwilr.com/article/578-dashboard-page-statuses). Default is `false`.

tags.description: The tags for your page. Tags are case-sensitive.

ownerId.description: ID of the user that should own the page. If not specified, the owner of the access token will be the owner of the page.

foldable.description: Foldable settings for the block. Folding is only possible with non Quote block types. Don't set this field for your Quote block.

enabled.description: The block has the fold/unfold button shown if the property is `true`, otherwise the ability to fold/unfold is disabled. Default is `false`.

isFolded.description: The block is folded by default if the property is `true`, otherwise it's expanded. Default is `false`.

label.description: The label shown when folding is enabled. Default is `Show / Hide`.

quoteSections.description: An array of sections in a saved Quote block. Only relevant if you want to customise your quote block. Ignore this field for non Quote block types.

put.description: Allows you to update the `published` property, the page's auto-link `expiry` settings, and its Qwilr Pay `paymentSettings`.

200.description: The page has been successfully updated

get.description: Retrieve a list of saved blocks from your account, with block names. Useful in developer workflow for mapping block names to saved block IDs.
Retrieve the quote tax definitions configured on your account, including each tax's ID, name, and rate.

post.description: Creates a new quote tax definition on your account. By default the tax's `id` is generated for you and returned in the response. Alternatively, supply your own `id` (for example, one from an external system) — it must be unique within your account and follow the format described on the request body. The `id` is set at creation time only and cannot be changed later; to use a different id, delete the tax and create a new one. Either way, store the returned `id` so you can reference the tax elsewhere in the API.

patch.description: Updates an existing quote tax definition. Only the fields you supply are changed; at least one of `name` or `rate` must be provided. A tax's `id` cannot be changed — to use a different id, delete the tax and create a new one.

parameters.name: taxId
parameters.description: The id of the tax to update.

delete.description: Deletes an existing quote tax definition from your account.

parameters.name: taxId
parameters.description: The id of the tax to delete.

get.summary: Get a list of all webhook subscriptions
get.description: Allows you to retrieve a list of all the webhook subscriptions that you have created using the create webhook subscription endpoint.

post.description: Creates a new webhook subscription to an event type. New events will be sent to the defined `targetUrl`. You should store the `id` field returned in case you want to cancel the subscription later on.

requestBody.description: Webhook callback that fires when a page is accepted.

200.description: Return this if your server accepts the callback. This acknowledgement should be made before the timeout of 30s. If the timeout occurs, the callback will be retried, up to 5 times.

requestBody.description: Webhook callback that fires when a page is partially accepted. Your page has been accepted by one or more accepters but not all accepters.

200.description: Return this if your server accepts the callback. This acknowledgement should be made before the timeout of 30s. If the timeout occurs, the callback will be retried, up to 5 times.

requestBody.description: Webhook callback that fires when a page is "accepted" as part of [previewing the acceptance process](https://help.qwilr.com/article/175-getting-documents-accepted#process).

200.description: Return this if your server accepts the callback. This acknowledgement should be made before the timeout of 30s. If the timeout occurs, the callback will be retried, up to 5 times.

requestBody.description: Webhook callback that fires when a page is viewed for the first time. It is intended to capture public page viewers while excluding views by logged-in Qwilr users. We also provide an [IP filtering feature](https://help.qwilr.com/article/315-filtering-out-internal-views) to exclude other internal views, if required.

200.description: Return this if your server accepts the callback. This acknowledgement should be made before the timeout of 30s. If the timeout occurs, the callback will be retried, up to 5 times.

requestBody.description: Webhook callback that fires when a page is viewed (regardless of whether it is the first view or a subsequent view). It is intended to capture public page viewers while excluding views by logged-in Qwilr users. We also provide an [IP filtering feature](https://help.qwilr.com/article/315-filtering-out-internal-views) to exclude other internal views, if required.

200.description: Return this if your server accepts the callback. This acknowledgement should be made before the timeout of 30s. If the timeout occurs, the callback will be retried, up to 5 times.

requestBody.description: Webhook callback that fires when a page is set to live from draft.

200.description: Return this if your server accepts the callback. This acknowledgement should be made before the timeout of 30s. If the timeout occurs, the callback will be retried, up to 5 times.

requestBody.description: Webhook callback that fires when a page is set to live from declined.

200.description: Return this if your server accepts the callback. This acknowledgement should be made before the timeout of 30s. If the timeout occurs, the callback will be retried, up to 5 times.

delete.description: Cancels a webhook event subscription using the `id` field that was returned when the webhook subscription was created.

parameters.name: subscriptionId
parameters.description: The id returned when your subscription was created

get.description: Retrieve the list of users from your account, with roles and team names. Useful for specifying the `ownerId` when creating a page.

bearerAuth.description:
All API requests need to be authenticated with your account's access token. You can find
your access token in the [Qwilr API Settings](https://app.qwilr.com/#/settings/api).

Your access token allows anyone to access your Qwilr pages and account. Be sure to keep it
secret! Do not share your access tokens in any public spaces such as your source repository
client-side code, and so forth.

**When making a request:**

- Use your access token with bearer authentication in the headers.
For example: `Authorization: Bearer fakeaccesstoken`
- Send all requests over [HTTPS](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/HTTPS)

SplashSettings.description: Configures background media settings for Text and Splash blocks. Only relevant if you want to customise Text and Splash blocks. Including this field when the block is not a Splash or Text block is invalid and will result in an error.

imageUrl.description: URL of the background image. Ensure the image is publicly available to the Internet.

videoUrl.description: URL of the background video. We currently only support YouTube videos. Ensure the video is publicly available to the Internet.

PostAcceptance.description: Configures a post-acceptance redirect for the page; accepters will be redirected upon accepting the page. If not provided, it will not be enabled.

enabled.description: Whether or not the post-acceptance action is enabled for the page. Default is `true`.

url.description: The URL that the accepter will be redirected to upon acceptance. The URL must have a protocol specified and it must be one of `http`, `https`, or no protocol specified and will be defaulted to `https`. Other protocols will be rejected with an error on page creation.

continueLabel.description: The label that will be used on the button to perform the post-acceptance action. Default is `Continue`.

AcceptBlockSettings.description: Configures settings for the accept block. Only relevant if you want to customise your accept block. Including this field when the block is not an Accept block is invalid and will result in an error.

TaxIds.description: The IDs of the account taxes to apply. Each ID must reference an existing tax in your account (create and manage taxes with the [Taxes endpoints](/docs/api/reference/taxes)); an unknown ID is rejected with a `400`. This field uses replace semantics: omit it to keep whatever taxes the saved block already had, send `[]` to remove all taxes, or list IDs to apply exactly those taxes.

QuoteSettings.description: Settings for the quote block. Only relevant if you want to customise your quote block. Ignore this field for non Quote block types.

selectionType.description: The [selection type/mode](/docs/guides/quote-data-lifecycle#quote-block-fundamentals) of the quote. Default is `combined`.

selectionRequired.description: If quote selection is enabled, this specifies if a selection must be made. Default is `false`.

currency.description: Currency for the quote block. If not specified then the currency of the saved quote block will be retained.

showTotalDiscount.description: Whether the total discount is shown. Default is `false`.

showTaxTotals.description: Whether the total tax is shown. Default is `false`.

showTotalExcludingTax.description: Whether the total amount excluding tax is shown. Default is `false`.

quoteDiscount.description: The discount to apply to the total quote price.

taxIds.description: The taxes to apply across the whole quote. Ignore this field for non Quote block types.

FeaturesList.description: For plan cards, the features that will be listed below the plan card.

Metadata.description: Data you provide, that will be returned as part of all Webhooks.

FixedCostLineItem.title: Fixed cost line item
FixedCostLineItem.description: A fixed cost line item, with a description and pricing information

description.description: The text description of the line item

unitPrice.description: The per unit price of the line item

unitLabel.description: The per unit label of the line item

quantity.description: The quantity of the line item

quantityRange.description: A range your client can choose the quantity from (when you don't want to provide a fixed quantity). This field is optional

taxExempt.description: Whether the line item is exempt from tax. Default is `false`.

optional.description: Whether the line item is optional. Default is `false`.

selected.description: Whether an optional line item is selected by default. Default is `false`.

lineItemDiscount.description: The discount to apply to the total line item price.

billingSchedule.description: Set the billing frequency, whether it's a one-off or recurring. Default is `one-off`.

recommended.description: For plan cards, whether it is highlighted as recommended. Default is `false`.

featuresList.description: For plan cards, the features that will be listed below the plan card.

metadata.description: Customer's metadata sent along with the request

TextLineItem.title: Text line item
TextLineItem.description: A text line item, with a description

description.description: The text description of the line item

metadata.description: Customer's metadata sent along with the request

QuoteSection.description: A Quote section containing a group of line items or plan cards.

displayMode.description: Display the quote section as a [table](https://help.qwilr.com/article/741-creating-tables-in-the-quote-block) or [plans](https://help.qwilr.com/article/740-creating-pricing-cards-in-the-quote-block). Default is `table`.

itemSingleSelect.description: Whether only one line item or plan card in this section can be selected at a time. Default is `false` for tables, `true` for plans.

description.description: The text description of the section.

lineItems.description: An array of line items (or plan cards) for the section.

showSubtotal.description: Whether the subtotal amount is shown or not. Default is `true`.

showUnitPrice.description: Whether or not to show the unit price column. Default is `true`.

showQuantity.description: Whether or not to show the quantity column. Default is `true`.

showCost.description: Whether or not to show the cost column. Default is `true`.

selected.description: Whether the quote section is pre-selected. Only relevant when the quote's selectionType is 'multi' or 'single'. Default is `false`.

selectionRequired.description: Whether this quote section must be selected. Only relevant when the quote's selectionType is 'multi' or 'single'". Default is `false`.

sectionDiscount.description: The discount to apply to the total section price.

showFeatures.description: Whether the feature lists are shown below each plan card. Default is `true`.

groupItemsByBillingSchedule.description: Whether the plan cards are grouped by billing frequency. Default is `false`.

metadata.description: Customer's metadata sent along with the request

TextVariableSubstitutions.title: Text Variable Substitutions
TextVariableSubstitutions.description: A text substitution. Replaces the variable with a plain text value.

RepeatingVariableSubstitutions.title: Repeating Variable Substitutions
RepeatingVariableSubstitutions.description: A repeating variable substitution. Content is repeated for each entry in the array.

BlockSubstitutions.description: Mapping of variable API reference keys to substitution values used inside a block.

AcceptTemplateSettings.description: Configures settings for the accept block in the template being used. Only relevant if you have an accept block. Setting this without an accept block in the template will result in an error.

PageSubstitutions.description: Mapping of variable API reference keys to substitution values used throughout the page. The values can be overwritten if the same keys are defined in the block-level substitutions.

Expiry.description: Page auto-link [expiry settings](https://help.qwilr.com/article/579-set-a-page-to-expire). When enabled, the page's public link automatically expires and the page is declined after the configured number of days. The expiry clock starts when the page is published, so a draft page just stores the setting until it goes live.

enabled.description: Whether auto-link expiry is enabled for the page. Default is `false`.

expireAfterDays.description: Number of days after the page is published before its link expires. Required when `enabled` is `true`. Must be an integer between 1 and 365.

postAcceptance.description: Post-acceptance details for the accepter. Null if post-acceptance not enabled for accepter.

auditTrailPdf.description: URL for the audit trail PDF download. Please note that it might take a few minutes for the PDF to be available after the Qwilr page is accepted.

agreementAuditTrailPdf.description: URL for the agreement audit trail PDF download. Please note that it might take a few minutes for the PDF to be available after the Qwilr page is accepted.

RecurringSettings.description: A single recurring (subscription) schedule — anchor/start/end dates, free trial and proration.

anchorDate.description: When the subscription's billing cycle is anchored.

endDate.description: When the subscription ends — a fixed number of billing cycles (`null` = never) or an explicit date.

RecurringConfig.description: Recurring (subscription) payment configuration for the page.

settings.description: Per-frequency schedule overrides, keyed by recurring frequency (e.g. `monthly`).

PaymentSettings.description: Page-level Qwilr Pay settings. `gatewayId` is the Qwilr id of the payment gateway the page charges through (`null` when no gateway is configured).

enabled.description: Whether Qwilr Pay is enabled on the page.

gatewayId.description: Qwilr id of the payment gateway the page charges through. `null` when none is configured.

requireOnAccept.description: Whether the buyer must pay at the moment they accept the page.

discoverable.description: Whether the payment option is surfaced to the buyer before acceptance.

customBusinessName.description: Business name shown on the payment UI, overriding the account default.

extraInformation.description: Extra information shown to the buyer on the payment UI.

payLaterButtonText.description: Custom label for the pay-later button.

partialPaymentConfig.description: Lets the buyer pay a portion of the total up front.

expiry.description: Auto-link expiry settings for the page. `enabled` is `false` when the page has no active expiry. `expireAfterDays` and `expiresOn` are only present once expiry is enabled; `expiresOn` (the computed absolute expiry timestamp) is set only after the page is published.

PaymentSettingsUpdate.description: Partial update of a page's Qwilr Pay settings. Every field is optional; omitted fields are left unchanged. Enabling payments (`enabled: true`) requires a gateway — pass `gatewayId` (the gateway's Qwilr id) or omit it to fall back to the account's default gateway. Note: enabling payments on a page that has no gateway configured replaces the whole block with account defaults rather than merging.

gatewayId.description: The gateway's Qwilr id. Omit to use the account's default gateway when enabling.

id.description: The unique identifier of the tax. Use this when referencing the tax elsewhere in the API.

name.description: The display name of the tax.

rate.description: The tax rate, as a percentage. May be `null` when no rate has been set.

id.description: An optional identifier for the tax. Supply your own `id` (for example, one from an external system) to reference the tax by a value you control; if omitted, Qwilr generates one for you. Must be unique within your account, and 1–64 characters of letters, digits, `-` or `_`, starting with a letter or digit. The `id` is set at creation time only and cannot be changed afterwards — to use a different id, delete the tax and create a new one.

name.description: The display name of the tax.

rate.description: The tax rate, as a percentage. Pass `null` to create a tax with no rate set.

UpdateTaxRequest.description: Updates an existing tax. Only the fields you supply are changed; at least one of `name` or `rate` must be provided.

name.description: The display name of the tax.

rate.description: The tax rate, as a percentage. Pass `null` to clear the rate.

BadRequest.description: Request has malformed data or invalid

Forbidden.description: No permission to access a resource

Conflict.description: Resource conflicts with an existing resource
